info.name: Mule Migrator - Agentic AI Platform
info.description:
Complete API collection for the MuleSoft to Spring Boot Agentic AI Migration Platform.

Base URL: https://mulesoft-migrator-prod-func-hwddm9.azurewebsites.net/api
Frontend: https://nice-rock-0f9182f00.6.azurestaticapps.net

request.description: Check API health, database connectivity, and service status.
Returns the currently authenticated user's Azure AD claims.

item.name: 🚀 Migrations
item.description: Core migration endpoints — create, list, get, cancel, delete migrations.

request.description: Create a new migration job. Returns 200 with migration ID. The migration is queued for async processing.

body.raw:
{
  "project_name": "user-service",
  "group_id": "com.example",
  "java_version": "17",
  "llm_config": {
    "provider": "azure_openai",
    "model": "gpt-4.1",
    "enabled": true
  },
  "input_xml_files": [
    {
      "name": "user-api.xml",
      "content": "<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<mule xmlns="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core"
      xmlns:http="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http"
      xmlns:db="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/db"
      xmlns:ee="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core">
  <http:listener-config name="HTTP">
    <http:listener-connection host="0.0.0.0" port="8081"/>
  </http:listener-config>
  <db:config name="Database_Config">
    <db:my-sql-connection host="localhost" port="3306" database="mydb" user="root" password="pass"/>
  </db:config>
  <flow name="getUsersFlow">
    <http:listener config-ref="HTTP" path="/api/users" allowedMethods="GET"/>
    <db:select config-ref="Database_Config">
      <db:sql>SELECT * FROM users</db:sql>
    </db:select>
    <ee:transform>
      <ee:message>
        <ee:set-payload><![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/json
---
payload map {
    id: $.id,
    name: $.name,
    email: $.email
}]]></ee:set-payload>
      </ee:message>
    </ee:transform>
  </flow>
  <flow name="createUserFlow">
    <http:listener config-ref="HTTP" path="/api/users" allowedMethods="POST"/>
    <logger level="INFO" message="Creating new user"/>
    <db:insert config-ref="Database_Config">
      <db:sql>INSERT INTO users (name, email) VALUES (:name, :email)</db:sql>
    </db:insert>
    <set-payload value="{"status": "created"}" mimeType="application/json"/>
  </flow>
</mule>",
      "size": 1200
    }
  ]
}

request.description: Create a complex migration with DB connectors, DataWeave transforms, and AI enhancement enabled (GPT-4.1).
List all migrations with pagination. Optional status filter: queued, running, completed, failed, cancelled.
Get full migration details including output_files, agent_trace, summary, tokens used, and cost.
Get all generated Spring Boot files with content. Returns {files: {filepath: content}}.
Cancel a running or queued migration.
Soft-delete a migration. Sets deleted_at timestamp, does not remove data.
Aggregate statistics: total migrations, by status, avg duration, total tokens, total cost.

item.name: 📚 RAG Knowledge Base
item.description: Retrieval-Augmented Generation endpoints — manage knowledge collections and search.

request.description: List all RAG knowledge base collections with document counts. Collections: mulesoft, dataweave, connector, best-practice.
List all 31 knowledge documents with title, content preview, and category.
Filter documents by category.
Semantic vector search across the knowledge base using Azure OpenAI embeddings.
Seed/re-seed the RAG knowledge base with 31 MuleSoft→Spring Boot migration patterns. Set clear_existing=true to wipe and re-index.

item.name: 🐙 GitHub
item.description: Push generated Spring Boot code to GitHub repositories.

request.description: Push all generated files from a completed migration to a GitHub repository. Requires a GitHub PAT with repo scope.

item.name: 🔐 Authentication
item.description: Azure AD authentication endpoints (handled by Azure Static Web App).

request.description: Redirect to Microsoft login page. After authentication, redirects back to the app with an auth cookie.
Returns the authenticated user's Azure AD claims: name, email, roles, tenant ID.
Logs out the current user and clears the auth cookie.

item.name: 🌐 Frontend Pages
item.description: React frontend pages hosted on Azure Static Web App.

request.description: Main dashboard with migration stats, recent migrations, and quick actions.
Create a new migration — drag & drop XML files or paste XML, configure options, start migration.
View migration detail — Agent Live Feed (left), File Explorer + Code Editor (right).
Paginated list of all past migrations with status filter.
RAG Knowledge Base — 4 collections (mulesoft, dataweave, connector, best-practice) with 31 documents.
Push generated Spring Boot code to GitHub repositories.
View generated OpenAPI spec for migrated APIs.
Platform settings — AI Engine status, theme, project defaults, security info.
